footer.description: Ibbil is a specialized platform providing comprehensive camel services in Saudi Arabia, including insurance, transport, permits, fodder, and veterinary care.

home.seoDescription: A specialized platform for camel services: insurance, transport, permits, veterinary care and stores.
home.heroTitle: Everything you need for the camel world in one place
home.heroSubtitle: Browse stores, manage permits, and request insurance, transport, and veterinary services with ease and security.
home.servicesSubtitle: Choose the service you need and get started instantly on Ibbil.

serviceItems.stores: Shop fodder, supplies, and camel products from trusted stores.
serviceItems.insurance: Clear insurance policies to protect your camels with confidence.
serviceItems.transport: Reliable transport services across cities and regions.
serviceItems.veterinary: Veterinary care and health follow-up from specialists.
serviceItems.permits: Issue and manage permits with simple, clear steps.
serviceItems.media: News and coverage from the camel world and the platform.

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Ibbil is the first platform to offer a complete commercial marketplace for all camel-related services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
about.body: It covers insurance, transport, and permits, as well as fodder and food stores, camel supplies, and veterinary services — in addition to camel trading, leasing, and sharing. Shop across many stores and benefit from services offered by merchants, veterinarians, and store owners on the Ibbil platform.
about.imageAlt: A man leading a camel across desert dunes at sunset — representing Ibbil platform heritage

home.ctaTitle: Are you a merchant or service provider?
home.ctaSubtitle: Join Ibbil and grow your business with thousands of users.

insurance.seoDescription: Request a camel transport insurance policy in Saudi Arabia through clear steps and secure payment.
insurance.heroTitle: The first specialized camel transport insurance in the Kingdom
insurance.heroSubtitle: Choose the right policy, submit your request in minutes, and pay securely to receive your insurance policy quickly.

images.hero: Camel transport truck with digital insurance protection in the Saudi desert
images.policyReview: Reviewing a camel transport insurance policy and comparing plan options
images.howToApply: Submitting a camel transport insurance request through the Ibbil platform
images.payment: Secure payment for camel transport insurance with approved payment methods

owners.title: Who can benefit
owners.description: All camel owners in Saudi Arabia can issue a policy that covers transport between regions.

transport.title: Camel transport coverage
transport.description: Purpose-built coverage to protect camels during transport with clear terms and a smooth request flow.

bestPlans.title: Choose the right plan
bestPlans.description: Compare available options and select the policy that matches your transport needs.

insurance.howDescription: Start your request from anywhere in the Kingdom, fill in the required details, then submit for review and issuance.

request.title: 1) Submit request
request.description: Enter the key transport details and provide camel and destination information.

review.title: 2) Review and approval
review.description: The request is validated and reviewed to ensure accurate policy issuance.

issue.title: 3) Pay and issue policy
issue.description: Pay using approved methods, then receive your invoice and insurance policy instantly.

insurance.footerDescription: After completing the form, your policy price is shown and you are redirected to secure checkout. Once payment is complete, your invoice and policy are issued electronically.

register.seoDescription: Complete your camel transport insurance request in clear steps: customer details, shipment info, pricing, and payment.
register.title: Camel Transport Insurance Request
register.subtitle: Enter your details and follow the steps to issue your policy easily and securely.
